message:
feat(harness): extend test harness with automation capabilities

Enhance the ftui-harness crate for comprehensive testing:

Main harness (main.rs, +102 lines):
- Headless mode for CI environments
- Screenshot capture to file
- Input event injection from script
- Timing-aware event playback
- Custom viewport sizing
- Output comparison with golden files
- Performance profiling integration

Cargo.toml updates:
- Additional dev dependencies for testing
- Feature flags for CI mode

Root crate (ftui/src/lib.rs):
- Re-export harness entry points
- Version constant updates

The harness now supports:
- Automated UI testing without TTY
- Snapshot-based regression testing
- Performance benchmarking in CI
- Custom scenario scripting

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
